summary: Clinical pharmacist with 6 years of hospital pharmacy experience transitioning into clinical informatics. PharmD with hands-on CPOE optimization and medication safety informatics work at Massachusetts General Hospital and Brigham and Women's Hospital. Self-taught in Python and SQL through clinical data analysis projects. Experienced with Epic EHR, FHIR-based interfaces, and healthcare data standards. Based in Boston and available for in-person work.

experience.title: Clinical Pharmacy Informaticist
bullets: Led redesign of CPOE medication alerts in Epic, reducing alert fatigue by 35% across the institution
Developed Python scripts to analyze 2 years of medication error data (18K+ incidents), identifying top alert override patterns
Collaborated with IT to implement FHIR-based medication reconciliation interface between Epic and pharmacy dispensing system
Authored clinical decision support rules for 12 high-risk drug interactions reviewed by the P&T committee
Trained 40+ pharmacists and residents on updated Epic medication management workflows

experience.title: Clinical Pharmacist — Inpatient
bullets: Delivered clinical pharmacy services on internal medicine and ICU units
Served on pharmacy informatics committee to develop medication use evaluation criteria
Wrote SQL queries against pharmacy data warehouse to produce monthly medication utilization reports
